register.title: New tracker — registration
register.comNameHint: Community receives a unique 5-character code after registration.
register.comCodeHint: 5 characters — get it from the community founder.
register.playerNameHint: Operatives receive their own 5-character code automatically.

recover.title: Password recovery
recover.hint: Email is used for access recovery only. New password is saved to your account.

operator.title: ⬡ Operator access
operator.hint: Player management in Shelter tab. Requires community code and operator key (shared by founder).

errors.loginUnknownId: ERROR: ID not in network. Register a new tracker.
errors.loginNoPassNeeded: ERROR: This account has no password — leave blank or reset data.
errors.recoverBadEmail: ERROR: Enter a valid registration email.
errors.recoverShortPass: ERROR: New password must be at least 4 characters.
errors.recoverUnknownEmail: ERROR: Email is not registered in the network.
errors.registerBadEmail: ERROR: Enter a valid email (e.g. name@email.com).
errors.registerShortPass: ERROR: Password must be at least 4 characters.
errors.registerBadComCode: ERROR: Community code must be 5 characters.
errors.registerUnknownCom: ERROR: No community with this code.
errors.registerIdTaken: ERROR: This ID already exists in the network.
errors.registerEmailTaken: ERROR: This email is already registered.
errors.operatorMissingFields: ERROR: Enter community code and operator key.
errors.operatorUnknownCom: ERROR: No community with this code.
errors.operatorBadKey: ERROR: Operator key does not match.

roxy.title: Set Up Your Safe Haven
roxy.desc: Walk to a secure location in the real world and save its coordinates as your Safe Haven.

sef.title: Find a Water Source
sef.desc: We won't survive without water. Find a stream or spring and mark its location.

herbert.title: Forest Staging Area
herbert.desc: Locate a sheltered clearing suitable for storing medical supplies.

ino.title: Find a Training Ground
ino.desc: We need a flat forest clearing suitable for physical training.

adam.title: Find a Lookout Tower
adam.desc: Walk to the base of the nearest lookout and register it as an observation point.

rx_perimeter.title: Perimeter Patrol
rx_perimeter.desc: Walk the perimeter around the safe haven clockwise. Check that the line hasn't been breached.

rx_supplies.title: Supply Inventory
rx_supplies.desc: Go through the stockpile and note what's running low. Without order, you're first to fall.

rx_nightwatch.title: Night Watch
rx_nightwatch.desc: Hold the east side of camp until dawn. Report every suspicious sound.

rx_escape.title: Escape Route Check
rx_escape.desc: Walk all planned escape routes and confirm they're passable.

rx_rally.title: Unit Rally Point
rx_rally.desc: Walk to the clearing and confirm the whole squad can fit — backup rendezvous point.

sf_rain.title: Rainwater Collection
sf_rain.desc: Build an improvised rain collector from a tarp and containers. It has to work.

sf_filter.title: Filter Maintenance
sf_filter.desc: Clean or replace the filtration material at the water source. Without water, we're dead.

sf_firewood.title: Fuel Stockpile
sf_firewood.desc: Chop and store firewood for three days of heating. Work for the woodcutters.

sf_stream.title: Stream Survey
sf_stream.desc: Follow the stream downstream and find the cleanest spot to draw water.

sf_repair.title: Drainage Repair
sf_repair.desc: Fix the channel or outlet so the stockpile doesn't flood in the rain.

hb_herbs.title: Herb Gathering
hb_herbs.desc: Find a spot rich in medicinal plants and fill a bag.

hb_disinfect.title: Zone Disinfection
hb_disinfect.desc: Clean and disinfect the medical corner workspace.

hb_medcheck.title: First-Aid Kit Check
hb_medcheck.desc: Go through the first-aid kit. Toss expired items, restock what's missing.

hb_pine.title: Pine Resin
hb_pine.desc: Find a pine tree and collect resin — for disinfection and patching.

hb_dry.title: Bandage Drying
hb_dry.desc: Dry clean cloth in the sun and store it in a waterproof bag.

in_run.title: Endurance Lap
in_run.desc: Run at least 3 km in rough terrain. Keep pace — no slacking.

in_track.title: Track Following
in_track.desc: Find and follow a fresh wildlife or human trail — log the direction.

in_night.title: Night Recon
in_night.desc: Walk the marked route at night without a flashlight. Stay alert or die.

in_climb.title: Terrain Obstacle
in_climb.desc: Find a natural obstacle (stump, rock) and clear it three times.

in_cache.title: Supply Cache
in_cache.desc: Hide a secret stash outside main camp — emergency backup.

ad_scout.title: High Ground Recon
ad_scout.desc: Climb the nearest hill or tree and observe the surroundings for 10 minutes.

ad_weather.title: Weather Log
ad_weather.desc: Watch the sky and wind for 30 minutes. Log what's coming — storm or calm.

ad_trail.title: Trail Marking
ad_trail.desc: Mark a safe trail with tape or stones from camp to the objective.

ad_animal.title: Wildlife Signs
ad_animal.desc: Find where animals drink or graze — vital for traps and early warning.

ad_map.title: Area Sketch
ad_map.desc: Walk the surroundings and add new routes we haven't taken to the mental map.
